PD MOTION TO MODIFY BAIL OR ELECTRONIC MONITORING CONDITIONS ; FILED

/CAL: TO SET & DEFENSE MOTION TO MODIFY BAIL OR ELECTRONIC MONITORING/MO GRTD/EMTERM/CTORD: GPS IS REMOVED/X: DEFENDANT ENTERS A LIMITED TIME WAIVER,/STIPLD: 07-29-22/CONTD: PRELIMINARY HEARING/DOP/TE: 1 HOUR/

/CAL:ARRIAGNMENT/TEXT:DEFT ENT NG PLEA(S) & DEN OF ALLEG/PD/FAWC/DEFTARR1/X:THE DEFENSE RESERVES THE RIGHT TO DEMURRER,/NTW60/LDPX: 07-18-22/ACM//X:AS A CONDITION OF RELEASE, THE DEFENDANT SHALL BE PLACED ON PRE-TRIAL MONITORING BY THE SHERIFF'S OFFICE,/DEF:SHALL BE FITTED WITH A GPS DEVICE AND IS ORDERED TO COMPLY WITH ALL TERMS OF RELEASE AS SET FORTH ON THE RECORDAND BY THE SFSO/CTORD: SFSO COMMUNITY PROGRAMS WILL PLACE AN ELECTRONIC MONITORING DEVICE ON THE DEFENDANT PRIOR TO RELEASE FROM CUSTODY AND WILL PROVIDE ALL INSTRUCTIONS AT THAT TIME,/X:ATTENT ANGER MANAGMENT CLASSES/X:SEE SIGNED ORDER IN FILE,/SA1: JOSE JIMENEZ/SA2: 1933 MISSION ST SF CA/SAORD3/SAORD/CONTD: TO SET/DOP/
